strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles, including AWS CDK and MongoDB at Optilyz and GraphQL/Node at RIDE Capital — covering the core stack the role asks for.

Demonstrated platform-building track record with GISCollective (event-driven geo-data platform on Kubernetes) showing fullstack ownership from database to UI, plus integrations across CRM-like workflows.
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) directly maps to the nice-to-have LLM/API integration qualifications.
concerns: Resume lists PostgreSQL only implicitly via SQL; primary database experience is MongoDB rather than PostgreSQL.
No explicit Nest.js framework experience mentioned, though Node.js/TypeScript background transfers naturally.
Based in Lagos while role requires high on-site presence (likely Germany), though prior Berlin tenure suggests relocation is feasible.

key_factors.factor: Platform engineering and clean-architecture mindset (TDD, trunk-based, craftsmanship)
LLM/AI-agent and AWS/Kubernetes nice-to-haves already covered

response.justification: The candidate brings exactly the TypeScript, React, Node.js and REST/web-architecture foundation the role calls for, layered on a decade of fullstack delivery across platforms with multi-source integrations very similar to the CRM/document/automation work described. Strong software-craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) and prior Berlin-based tenure at Optilyz, RIDE and Sociomantic show he thrives in this exact environment, while current re:cinq work on MCP and agentic tooling, plus AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure, already covers most nice-to-have qualifications — giving the team senior-level upside well beyond an entry-level hire.
